/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -g  -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 -Wl,--dynamic-list-data CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/argparse.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/daemon.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/core/node_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/core/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/adapter/msg_q.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/adapter/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/adapter/adapter.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/adapter/driver/cache.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/src/adapter/driver/driver.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/cert_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/log_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/metric_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/normal_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/rw_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/adapter_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/datatag_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/global_config_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/group_config_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/plugin_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/version_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/scan_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/otel_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/cid_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/tpy_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/system_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/datalayers_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/rest.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/user.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/plugins/restful/simulator_handle.c.o CMakeFiles/neuron.dir/simulator/modbus_tcp_simulator.c.o -o neuron   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,./:/usr/local/lib:/src/build-native-cm4: -ldl libneuron-base.so -lsqlite3 -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libxml2.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.a -ldl -lnng -lzlog -ljansson -ljwt -lxml2 -lm -lprotobuf-c -lsqlite3 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libxml2.so -lmbedtls -lmbedx509 -lmbedcrypto
